# Pending Research Index

**Generated by**: Sarah (Knowledge Curator)

Research briefs capture knowledge gaps that cannot be filled from currently ingested sources. Each brief states what the wiki already knows and what source material is still needed. Run `@sarah research-gaps` to generate briefs from the gap log; `@sarah close-research-gaps` to retire briefs once a covering source is ingested. Retired briefs move to `_resolved/`.
